title: Workflow to Select Functional Promoter DNA Baits and Screen Gene Libraries in Yeast
author: Fañanás‐Pueyo, Anhel, et al.

steps.title: Analysis in planta (optional)
steps.instruction: Before carrying out the Y1H screening with the selected promoter fragment/s, we recommend performing previous analyses in planta by transient or stable expression to identify whether the chosen fragment may be functionally relevant in the transcriptional regulation of the gene of interest. Nicotiana benthamiana can be used for transient expression analyses.
